modules.title: Asset Accounting
modules.description: SAP Best Practices configuration guide for Asset Accounting. Covers organizational structures, chart of depreciation, asset classes, depreciation areas, G/L integration, and configuration steps.

modules.title: Vendor Integration
modules.description: SAP S/4HANA Cookbook on Customer/Vendor Integration (CVI). Topics: Business Partner, CVI conversion, Fiori apps for customer/vendor master, migration, synchronization cockpit, post-processing.

modules.title: FI – MM Integration
modules.description: Training material on FI–MM integration. Explains Material Master, Valuation Class, Movement Types, transaction keys (BSX), automatic posting configuration (OBYC), GR/IR, and accounting entries for MM movements.

modules.title: Project System (PS)
modules.description: SAP PS Handbook covering organization, integration, configuration, Project Builder, Planning Board, ProMan, transaction codes, reports, tables, and IMG.

modules.title: Sales & Distribution (SD)
modules.description: SAP SD training material. Covers enterprise structure, master data, sales documents, pricing, account determination, billing, contracts, consignment, credit management, intercompany sales, third-party sales, make-to-order, variant configuration, deliveries, and warehouse management.
